headline: Why Is Construction Partners Stock Surging on Friday?
summary: Construction Partners, Inc. (NASDAQ: ROAD) stock is surging on Friday after S&P Dow Jones Indices announces the civil infrastructure firm will join the S&P SmallCap 600 index effective Wednesday, July 22, 2026.
